hero.title2: for the way you actually work
hero.desc: Mapick is a Skill manager that helps you discover better-fit Skills, clean up noisy setups, reduce wasted AI spend, and build a stack worth keeping long term. It uses real usage signals, workflow patterns, and safety filters instead of generic rankings.

why.title: Five reasons people keep coming back to Mapick
why.body: The goal is not to install more. The goal is to keep what fits, reduce wasted AI spend, and build a stronger stack over time.
cards: Mapick recommends Skills based on real usage, workflow fit, and how you actually work.
It spots idle, duplicate, or low-fit Skills so your setup gets lighter and easier to maintain over time.
Cleaner setups and better-fit recommendations help cut wasted context, tool overhead, and avoidable AI spend.
Recommendations can be filtered through quality and safety signals before they reach your shortlist.
Mapick can suggest role-based bundles and fill the missing pieces when a workflow is only partially complete.

steps.title: Three steps. Clear enough to use right away.
items: Install Mapick in the tool you already use. No long setup flow.
Mapick tracks usage, workflow order, and setup health to understand what belongs in your stack.
Get better recommendations, cleaner setups, and clearer reports as your usage data grows.

report.title: What's your MCP persona?
report.body: Mapick builds a shareable skill card from your real usage — persona, proof points, and a stack worth copying. First screen is your story, not a product pitch.
report.taunt: Your AI ships faster than your sleep schedule recovers.
report.quote: I am a Midnight Shipper on MCP. In 67 days, my AI stack delivered more output than my sleep schedule could defend.
stats: Cost and output together feel more believable
What people actually want to copy

scenarios.title: Three people. Three ways Mapick helps.
scenarios.body: Whether you are looking for the right tool, cleaning up, or completing a workflow, Mapick gives you a clearer next step.

cards.name: Alice
cards.label: Finds the right Skill faster
steps: A tool with strong retention or workflow fit enters the candidate pool.
It surfaces because it fits Alice's workflow, not because it is just popular.
Security and fit checks are already part of the shortlist.

cards.name: Bob
cards.label: Cleans up a noisy setup
steps: Mapick spots tools that have not been meaningfully used.
It suggests what to keep and what to remove.
Fewer distractions, fewer stale tools, stronger setup health.

cards.name: Carol
cards.label: Completes a workflow bundle
steps: Carol already has part of a workflow installed.
It recommends the missing tools that complete the workflow.
The result is a more complete stack without manual hunting.

setups.title: Different roles keep different stacks
setups.body: The point is not to install more. The point is to keep what truly fits.
cards: Summarize · Tavily Search · Calendar Ops · Image Lab
Code Review · GitHub Ops · Docker · CI/CD · Search
setups.note: Different role, different stack, different fit.

platforms.title: One profile across multiple tools
platforms.body: Use Mapick across MCP-compatible tools without rebuilding your setup from scratch.
platforms.configBody: One endpoint, one profile, one setup. Copy it once and reuse it across supported clients.

footer.title: Keep what works. Discover what fits.
footer.body: Install Mapick, clean the noise, and build a Skill setup that actually belongs to you.
footer.note: Mapick: Skill manager for MCP-compatible tools, personalized Skill recommendations, setup cleanup, bundles, reports, and shareable configs.
